{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Ozriel's sight
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ozriel's sight]] was restricted to a six-star [[Spider]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1">''Dreadgod'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ozriel]] was forbidden from freeing himself through inaction or fleeing his duties.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
